forecast.day_comments: Snow. The snow could be heavy at times.  Steady temperature around 32. Wind chill values between 24 and 29. South southeast wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.  Chance of precipitation is 100%. Total nighttime snow accumulation of 7 to 11 inches possible.
forecast.night_comments: Snow. The snow could be heavy at times.  High near 32. Wind chill values between 22 and 27. Southwest wind 8 to 10 mph becoming west northwest in the afternoon. Winds could gust as high as 23 mph.  Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of 5 to 9 inches possible.
